final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original editorial-style photo of Korean cafe coffee and desserts, with hand-drawn white-pen annotation overlays, no people, suitable for Instagram Stories.

Style/medium: needs a Korean cafe aesthetic shot on smartphone — exact stylistic execution is yours; annotation layer needs a white-pen hand-drawn sketch overlay in a "drawn in one stroke" rough, slightly uneven style — exact line weight and texture are yours
Composition: must include hand-drawn outline traces around each element, with arrows or dashed lines guiding the eye between annotations
Subject: must include stylish coffee drink(s) and dessert(s) typical of Korean cafe culture — no people
Scene/backdrop: must include a Korean cafe interior or tabletop setting — exact backdrop detail is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a soft, warm, Instagram-worthy cafe atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a muted, fashionable cafe direction — exact tones and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs the annotation layer to feel like white pen on photo — rough, hand-lettered, slightly imperfect — exact grain and sheen are yours
Text (verbatim): must include handwritten Japanese annotation text (7割ひらがな・3割かんじ) in diary/monologue tone, one short comment per element — examples by category: 飲み物 → 「さっぱり」「やさしい甘さ♡」; 食べ物 → 「しっとり」「さいこう…」; 空間 → 「くつろぐ」「いい時間」; 全体一言 → 「しあわせすぎた〜」; decorate sparingly with steam wisps ☁, sparkles ✦, hearts ♡, small emoticons — leave breathing room / white space
Constraints: must preserve the annotation overlay as an integral part of the image (not a separate layer feel); white space must be maintained — annotations must not crowd the photo; overall feel must be Instagram Stories × magazine rough-notes style, fashionable yet casual
Avoid: overcrowded annotations; heavy or mechanical line strokes; people or human figures; overly polished or printed-looking text
